title: Tier Checker
description: A mod which lets you see players' MCTiers.io, MCTiers.com and FFATierList.com tiers from a command.
body:
## Tier Checker
Client-side mod through which you can read other players' tiers on [MCTiers.com](https://mctiers.com), [MCTiers.io](https://mctiers.io) and [FFATierList.com](https://ffatierlist.com).

You can use it on any server and any singleplayer world.

### Usage:
To use it, type `/mctier <name>` in chat (example: `/mctier Steve`). This will use your preferred backend, but if it has missing tiers for a category or another backend has newer data for it, it will use that backend instead.

To specify a backend manually, use `/mctier <backend> <name>` (example: `/mctier io Steve`).

The backend used by default is the `mctiers.com` backend, you can change it in the mod's settings.
